data.title: TEST: Featured Events
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Automatic - Future Events (Default)","description":"Default configuration showing future events sorted ASC (closest first). ThemeHeading with eyebrow, heading, and description."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"eyebrow":"Events","heading":"Join Our Upcoming Events","description":"From career fairs to late-night study breaks, there's always something happening.","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"future","postsLimit":3,"buttonLabel":"View Event"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Automatic - Past Events","description":"Past events sorted DESC (latest first). Tests eventList toggle."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"eyebrow":"Past Events","heading":"Events We've Hosted","description":"Take a look at some of our recent events.","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"past","postsLimit":3,"buttonLabel":"View Event"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Manual Selection","description":"Hand-picked events using PostSelectorSortable. Tests manual mode."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"eyebrow":"Featured","heading":"Don't Miss These Events","postsSource":"manual","selectedPosts":[],"buttonLabel":"Learn More"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Minimal - Required Fields Only","description":"Only heading provided. Tests empty state handling for eyebrow, description, and optional fields."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"heading":"Upcoming Events","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"future","postsLimit":2} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content Edge Case","description":"Very long heading and description text. Tests overflow and text wrapping."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"eyebrow":"Student Life \u0026 Campus Activities Department Events Calendar","heading":"Join Our Upcoming Events and Activities Happening Across All Campus Locations Throughout the Academic Year","description":"From career fairs to late-night study breaks, there's always something happening on campus. We host hundreds of events each year spanning academic, social, athletic, and cultural activities designed to enrich the student experience and build community connections that last a lifetime.","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"future","postsLimit":5,"buttonLabel":"View Event Details and Register"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Single Event","description":"Shows a single event. Tests limit of 1."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"eyebrow":"Featured Event","heading":"Next Big Event","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"future","postsLimit":1,"buttonLabel":"View Event"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Hide If Empty","description":"Tests hideIfEmpty behavior - section should be hidden if no events match."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/featured-events {"heading":"Events","postsSource":"automatic","eventList":"future","postsLimit":3,"hideIfEmpty":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
